task_completion.description: Verify the agent accessed the correct Sales Order for the customer.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a Sales Order page in the ERPNext web interface showing the customer 'Consumers and Consumers Express' and a total amount of 700.00.

task_completion.description: Verify the agent created and submitted a Delivery Note to ship the goods.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a Delivery Note document in ERPNext linked to 'Consumers and Consumers Express' with a 'Submitted' or 'Completed' status badge.

task_completion.description: Verify the agent created and submitted a Sales Invoice for the order.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a Sales Invoice document in ERPNext for the customer, totaling 700.00, with a 'Submitted', 'Unpaid', or 'Paid' status badge.

task_completion.description: Verify the agent created and submitted a Payment Entry to record the customer's payment.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a Payment Entry document in ERPNext showing a received amount of 700.00 from 'Consumers and Consumers Express', with a 'Submitted' status badge.

task_completion.description: Verify the outstanding balance is cleared, completing the fulfillment cycle.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the Sales Invoice showing a green 'Paid' status badge, or the Sales Order showing a 'Completed' status badge, indicating the outstanding amount is 0.00.

integrity.description: Verify the agent interacted with the ERPNext web interface in a browser.
integrity.visual_evidence: Look for a web browser window showing the ERPNext UI. The agent should not be using terminal commands, API scripts, or database clients to bypass the UI.

integrity.description: Verify the documents were actually submitted in the system and not just left as drafts.
integrity.visual_evidence: Look for system-generated document IDs (e.g., MAT-DN-..., ACC-SINV-...) and official status badges (Submitted/Paid) at the top left of the document pages, rather than just filled-out draft forms.

integrity.description: Verify the agent didn't use browser developer tools to fake the completion statuses.
integrity.visual_evidence: Ensure the browser developer tools (Inspect Element) are not open and modifying the DOM to fake 'Paid' or 'Completed' status badges.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Customer: 'Consumers and Consumers Express'. Items to fulfill: 'Wind Turbine' (Qty: 20, Rate: 21.0) and 'Wind Mill A Series' (Qty: 10, Rate: 28.0). Total order amount: 700.0. The agent must process a Delivery Note, Sales Invoice, and Payment Entry for this specific order and amount.
